scripts.bundle:run: databricks bundle run octopus -t octopus-ai --profile octopus-ai
scripts.bundle:bootstrap: databricks bundle run bootstrap_job -t octopus-ai --profile octopus-ai
scripts.app:assemble: rm -rf databricks/app/_stage && mkdir -p databricks/app/_stage && cp -R apps/web/.next/standalone/. databricks/app/_stage/ && mkdir -p databricks/app/_stage/apps/web/.next/static && cp -R apps/web/.next/static/. databricks/app/_stage/apps/web/.next/static/ && mkdir -p databricks/app/_stage/apps/web/public && (cp -R apps/web/public/. databricks/app/_stage/apps/web/public/ 2>/dev/null || true) && mkdir -p databricks/app/_stage/apps/web/prompts && (cp -R apps/web/prompts/. databricks/app/_stage/apps/web/prompts/ 2>/dev/null || true) && cp databricks/app/app.yaml databricks/app/_stage/app.yaml && cp databricks/app/.databricksignore databricks/app/_stage/.databricksignore
scripts.deploy:databricks: bun run build && bun run app:assemble && bun run bundle:deploy && bun run bundle:run
